faqs.question: How much does fly control cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Our fly control services in Larchmont range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of flies present. We provide detailed inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Larchmont homes?
faqs.answer: Larchmont properties commonly experience issues with house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Waterfront properties may also see increased activity from flies attracted to moisture and organic matter, particularly during warmer months near the Sound.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Larchmont residents and businesses. Fly infestations can escalate quickly, so we prioritize rapid response times to address your pest control needs promptly and effectively.

faqs.question: Are your fly control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and provide clear instructions for any temporary restrictions during treatment.
